title: Creating a complex data visualization
scenario: Design a data visualization that represents the global distribution of COVID-19 cases over time. The visualization should include multiple series, a clear legend, and a meaningful title. The prompt should be under 100 words.
constraints: Must use a clear and descriptive title and legend

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the data is accurate and consistent.
Check if the data visualization is clear and effectively communicates the information.
Check if the prompt is adhered to and is under 100 words.
Check if the visualization is complex and effectively communicates the data.
